project.name: Sherin AI Financial Intelligence Platform
project.description: Global AI-powered autonomous trading and financial intelligence system

phases.name: Intelligence Layer
phases.goal: Convert raw data into structured signals

phases.name: Prediction Engine
phases.goal: Forecast market movement before price moves

modifications_and_deviations.deviation: Free/alternative APIs (NewsAPI, Alpha Vantage, FRED) recommended as interim replacements due to cost
modifications_and_deviations.reason: Reuters and Bloomberg APIs require enterprise contracts ($10K-$50K/year)
modifications_and_deviations.impact: Medium - data quality may differ slightly but pipeline architecture remains identical

modifications_and_deviations.original: Full Apache Flink stream processing with custom UDFs
modifications_and_deviations.deviation: Simplified Python Kafka consumer with spaCy + FinBERT inline processing
modifications_and_deviations.reason: Flink UDF registration requires Java/Scala bridge; Python-native approach faster to prototype
modifications_and_deviations.impact: Low for Phase 1; Flink should be reintroduced in Phase 2 for scale

modifications_and_deviations.original: Confluent Schema Registry with Avro schemas
modifications_and_deviations.deviation: JSON serialization used initially; Avro migration planned for Week 3-4
modifications_and_deviations.reason: Faster initial development; schema registry adds operational overhead early on
modifications_and_deviations.impact: Low short-term; must be resolved before production scale

timeline_status.notes: Project is at day 0 of execution. Blueprint is finalized. Implementation begins now.
